Columns.Name: 調査報告書_非公開数_申込事業者
調査報告書数_申込事業者

ExternalDatabaseInfo.CreateViewSql:
SELECT a.survey_id AS "調査ID",
    count(a.attachment_id) AS "ファイル数",
    count(
        CASE
            WHEN (a.file_attribute_id = 18) THEN 1
            ELSE NULL::integer
        END) AS "調査報告書_非公開数",
    count(
        CASE
            WHEN (a.file_attribute_id = 6) THEN 1
            ELSE NULL::integer
        END) AS "調査報告書数",
    count(
        CASE
            WHEN ((a.file_attribute_id = 18) AND (a.publish_flg = 1) AND (a.hidden_flg = 0) AND (b.applicant_company_authority > 0)) THEN 1
            ELSE NULL::integer
        END) AS "調査報告書_非公開数_申込事業者",
    count(
        CASE
            WHEN ((a.file_attribute_id = 6) AND (a.publish_flg = 1) AND (a.hidden_flg = 0) AND (b.applicant_company_authority > 0)) THEN 1
            ELSE NULL::integer
        END) AS "調査報告書数_申込事業者"
   FROM ((t_object_attachment a
     JOIN m_file_attribute b ON ((a.file_attribute_id = b.file_attribute_id)))
     JOIN m_file_class c ON ((b.file_class_id = c.file_class_id)))
  WHERE ((c.survey_flg = 1) AND (a.survey_id IS NOT NULL) AND (a.active_flg = 1))
  GROUP BY a.survey_id;
